programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: A new bidder hopes to dominate the competition; Darrell battles for a drum set; Jarrod and Brandi face a big loss.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy and Rene team up in an attempt to stop Darrell and Brandon's planned buying spree; a date reignites Jarrod and Brandi's passion for purchasing storage units.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The new bidder returns; Barry is intrigued by a locker with a hole in the wall; Jarrod pulls a sneaky trick.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Barry becomes an organ donor; Jarrod and Brandi's profits roll away; Dave chooses not to deal; Darrell's fortunes rest on the flip of a coin.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: A locker in Whittier, Calif., features a high payoff; Dave eyes a unit with a stockpile of antiques; Barry's locker may contain old weapons.

programme.title: Desert Law
programme.desc: The burning summer is finally ending in Pima County, Ariz., but crime doesn't stop; Detective McLeod responds to an attempted abduction, Deputy McCall-Miller stops out with a drunk driver who refuses to admit he's crashed into a utility pole.

programme.title: Desert Law
programme.desc: In Pima County, Ariz., the Sheriff's Department fights crime at night; Detective McLeod pursues a hit-and-run driver while Deputy Stewart encounters couples in parked cars.

programme.title: Desert Law
programme.desc: In Pima County, Arizona, the blistering desert heat leaves tempers short and drivers on edge; Deputy Pool arrests an alleged DUI speeder with kids in the car, while Deputy McCall-Miller pulls over a driver who's in possession of a Bowie knife and a pocket full of meth.

programme.title: Desert Law
programme.desc: The darkness of the nighttime desert in Pima County is the perfect cover for crime; Deputy Pool deals with a curious case of identity theft; Deputy Carter clears up a high-speed crash into a cactus, and faced with a tricky traffic stop; Deputy Stewart is forced to make a split-second decision.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: Tulsa detectives head to Texas to chase down two suspects after they kill a young father of two.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: A father gone missing turns up dead when his plans to evict a tenant ignite a murderous rage.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: A man living at an extended-stay hotel is shot dead in his room after a night of gambling with friends turns into more than anyone bargained for; in Mobile, Ala., a young woman helps a friend in need and pays the ultimate price.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: A Mobile homeowner reports a theft of $9,000 to the police, and just thirty minutes later, a local father of three is mysteriously killed on their front porch.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: A young father loses his life when tempers flare and bullets fly at a Gwinnett County nightclub.

programme.title: After the First 48
programme.desc: After the remains of a 16-year-old girl are found in the woods with no identification, Gwinnett County detectives have little to go on to find her killer; in the pursuit of justice, the prosecution must prove the girl was murdered despite the lack of evidence for what caused her death.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw
programme.desc: When an elderly woman is found brutally murdered in her home, a delivery receipt for some missing electronics leads detectives to an unlikely suspect.

programme.desc: In a chilling tale of betrayal, Nikki Sue Entzel plots with her lover to kill her husband, staging a deadly fire to cash in on life insurance-love, lies and murder igniting a deadly conspiracy.

programme.desc: Armando Iannucci and Joanna Page contemplate an alien invasion in the Taskmaster house. Joel Dommett enjoys putting things on things and Amy Gledhill performs sock-based stand-up.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host the comedy quiz mash-up. Bob Mortimer and Tom Allen take on Richard Ayoade and Harriet Dyer. With Ian Smith and Joe Wilkinson.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Prisoner, David Attenborough's 100 Years on Planet Earth, Countdown, First Dates, Scam Interceptors, and the News on local elections and Sir Keir Starmer.

programme.title: Virgin Island
programme.desc: As the group learn the art of seduction in the penultimate phase, Jason lowers his guard, Ellen continues to flourish, and the number of ex-virgins is set to increase.

programme.title: Virgin Island
programme.desc: As the retreat concludes, Bertie heads for the bedroom with Kat for the lesson of a lifetime. Katie and Callum get together. And has Marianne finally overcome her mistrust of men.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In New York, Gordon Ramsay visits PJ's Steakhouse, where owners Joe and Madalyn are in serious debt and struggling to keep the high-end restaurant afloat.

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Bournemouth, there are hard-to-please guests, intriguing photos and interesting impressions, as three couples compete to host the best dinner party.

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: George visits a blinged-up double-decker bus that's been turned into a posh restaurant and bar. Plus: a converted 1970s Citroën van, and the next generation of beach huts.

programme.title: Sarah Beeny's New Country Lives
programme.desc: Matt and Lorraine want to create a new front entrance to their quirky country home but uncover problems above and below ground.

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Some extra brunch as Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer host the food and chat show.

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Lucy Porter in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Little Carla, Happy at Last (Part 1/2): Carla and Eddie plan to marry but have many superstitious obstacles to overcome, including his mother, her kids and a nervous Rebecca.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Little Carla, Happy at Last (Part 2/2): Sam tries to act as peacemaker when Eddie cancels his wedding to Carla due to his mother's disapproval of the bride. Can he reunite them.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: When Frasier and Lilith's relationship turns sour, the gang play a prank on Frasier and convince him that Rebecca's falling for him. Will Frasier leave Lilith.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Upset that Marie and Debra can't seem to resolve their differences, Robert decides to join a support group that the family believe is a cult.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra decides that she and Ray should visit a marriage counsellor. At first Ray's against the idea, but he changes his mind when he meets the therapist.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: When Ally's teacher overhears Ray commenting about the kids' excessive workload, she invites him to address the curriculum review board.

programme.title: Matt Allwright
programme.desc: Matt looks at the big news stories developing during the day and offers help and advice to save you money and make your lives a little easier.

programme.title: Vanessa
programme.desc: Raw, unfiltered, authentic and personal, Vanessa Feltz wants you to tell her what's on your mind. Fiery discussions, a good giggle and plenty of afternoon gossip.

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: When a corpse is found floating in the East River it leads to the revelation of a secret dating back to prohibition times.

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: When Castle's novel Heat Wave is turned into a film, the lead actress researches her part by shadowing him on a murder case.

programme.title: Love Nature
programme.desc: Aged six, Benji decided to turn the family garden into a nature reserve complete with a pond made out of the washing up bowl. He's now raised thousands of pounds for nature charities.

programme.title: 5 News with Dan Walker
programme.desc: Join Dan Walker and the team for the news that matters to you.

programme.title: Love Nature
programme.desc: Feed the Birds is a Shropshire charity combating loneliness through a shared love of wildlife. At 89, retired teacher Pam enjoys weekly visits from volunteer Hannah.

programme.title: Susan Calman's Grand Day Out
programme.desc: Susan and her campervan hit the road for a trip to the fabulous Yorkshire Valleys, taking in York Minster, a Teddy Bear Museum, a miniature steam train ride and Bettys cafe tea rooms.

programme.title: Coastguard: Search & Rescue SOS

programme.desc: Alex Polizzi visits Breaks Fold Farm in The Dales to help a couple juggling two of the toughest industries to succeed in: farming and hospitality. Can she turn things around.

programme.desc: Adella becomes increasingly resentful of Liza and plays a cruel prank on her. Imelda seeks to get to know Mary and Ma better and, spotting the gambler in Ma, introduces her to bridge.

programme.title: The Push: Death on a Cruise Ship

programme.title: My Boyfriend Made Me Do It

programme.title: Car Pound Cops
